case_title: MIDLAND UFNDING LLC VS. ARMANDO NEVAREZ et al

docket_entries.description: AFFIDAVIT OF VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND UFNDING LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND UFNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT NEVAREZ, ARMANDO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-05-2011
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT NEVAREZ, ARMANDO
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JAN-06-2012 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. THE OCT-05-2011 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND UFNDING LLC SERVED JUL-19-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT NEVAREZ, ARMANDO
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-05-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-06-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
